title: athyrium dombeyi
intro: Athyrium dombeyi, also known as Dombey's lady fern, is a species of fern native to Asia and the Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to aid in wound healing and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Athyrium dombeyi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Athyrium dombeyi include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
